overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district during blue hour. The player walks along a wet sidewalk past a parked golden sports car, crosses a multi-lane street, and approaches a towering building with large Biotechnica digital billboards while neon signs illuminate the futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with parked sports car

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt walks from right to left across the field of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a parked golden sports car

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt crossing the sidewalk from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: sleek golden sports car parked along the curb with reflective surface
tall modern building with distinctive teal neon lighting along its edges
building facade with red neon signage
elevated roadway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a downtown sidewalk during blue hour, with a golden sports car parked on the left and futuristic skyscrapers rising ahead. The player walks forward as a pedestrian crosses from right to left, while neon signs and the teal-lit building dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing transition area with bollards

events.description: navigation UI changes from DOWNTOWN to CITY CENTER marker
moving past sidewalk bollards and entering the street proper

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the parked car and moving from sidewalk into the multi-lane street

entered.detail: large building with massive digital billboard displays beginning to come into view
white car driving in the distance on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the sidewalk into the street, passing protective bollards as the UI marker updates to CITY CENTER. The golden car falls behind while the Biotechnica building with its large digital displays becomes visible on the right, and the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with towering corporate buildings

events.description: large Biotechnica digital billboards become prominent on the right side building
camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet street toward the building with large digital displays, occasionally looking up at the architecture

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboards displaying forest imagery and Biotechnica corporate logo
extremely tall dark skyscraper towering above the surrounding buildings
red neon lighting along the awning and entrance of the building on the right

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the street crossing as massive Biotechnica digital billboards dominate the right side of the frame. The camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the surrounding skyscrapers, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the blue hour sky and neon lighting. The segment ends as the player approaches the building entrance with its distinctive red neon trim.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet downtown sidewalk into the heart of a neon-lit corporate plaza during the blue hour. It begins by walking past a parked golden sports car and a crossing pedestrian, with teal-lit skyscrapers looming ahead against the darkening sky. As the camera transitions from the sidewalk into the street, the golden car recedes and the wet asphalt begins to reflect the vibrant surrounding lights. The scene then expands as the player moves deeper into the crossing, where the camera tilts upward to emphasize the massive scale of the Biotechnica digital billboards and towering architecture. Finally, the movement concludes as the player approaches the building entrance, marked by its distinctive red neon trim.
